flood: <red><bold>Too many attempts</bold></red><newline><gray>You're connecting too fast. Wait a few seconds and try again.</gray>
block: <red><bold>You can't join right now</bold></red><newline><gray>Your connection has been blocked for security. If you think this is a mistake, contact the server staff.</gray>
maxperip: <red><bold>Too many accounts at once</bold></red><newline><gray>The maximum number of accounts connected from your network at the same time has been reached. Close one session and try again.</gray>
cmd.reloaded: Config reloaded, cache cleared and blocks resyncing.
cmd.savefail: Couldn't save the key to config.yml (write permissions?).
cmd.keysaved: Key saved. Connecting to the backend…
cmd.active: ✓ License active. Jarvis is now protecting the server (no restart).
cmd.validatefail: Key saved, but it couldn't be validated with the Jarvis server yet. This may be a temporary connection drop; it will retry in the background. If the warning persists, check that the key is correct.
cmd.descKey: set your license key without restarting (console)
cmd.descReload: reload config, clear cache and resync blocks
